title: Pentagon UFO files released: New Mexico's history with flying discs and green fireballs
description: The Pentagon released 162 previously classified UFO documents, many tied to New Mexico, including files on the Roswell Incident, green fireball sightings and mysterious aerial phenomena dating back to 1945.

title: 5 Shocking Photos From Trump's UFO Files: FBI 'Bronze Disc' Image Sparks Frenzy Over Proof Aliens Exist
description: A newly released UFO images from the Trump Administration's archive has sparked intense online debate, with critics questioning its authenticity and supporters viewing it as a turning point in government transparency.

title: Pentagon Declassifies Decades of UAP Files, Reveals Global Sightings and ‘Four-Foot’ Humanoid Reports
description: A massive cache of once-classified UAP files released by the United States Department of Defense reveals decades of unexplained aerial sightings.

title: 10 Greatest Sci-Fi Movies About UFO
description: The idea of UFOs has been huge in Hollywood for many years, and here are the best movies released that deal with these unidentified flying objects.
